patches.summary: Accept SE_RANKING_API_KEY as the preferred alias while retaining generated SE_RANKING_API_KEY_QUERY compatibility.
patches.reason: SE Ranking documentation refers to a standard API key. Agents should be able to use SE_RANKING_API_KEY without being silently overridden by the generated query-name compatibility variable.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passes; when both environment variables are present, SE_RANKING_API_KEY wins.

patches.summary: Add public-library provenance fields plus research, shipcheck-skip, and dogfood-results artifacts for review.
patches.reason: The public library requires current Printing Press provenance, manuscript research/proofs, and a dogfood-results.json artifact for new CLI submissions.
patches.validated_outcome: publish validate, verify-publish-package, verify-press-version, and verify-manifest pass locally.
